title: Packaging and Filling Machine Operators and Tenders
description: Operate or tend machines to prepare industrial or consumer products for storage or shipment. Includes cannery workers who pack food products.

tasks.text: Attach identification labels to finished packaged items, or cut stencils and stencil information on containers, such as lot numbers or shipping destinations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Sort, grade, weigh, and inspect products, verifying and adjusting product weight or measurement to meet specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Stop or reset machines when malfunctions occur, clear machine jams, and report malfunctions to a supervisor.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe machine operations to ensure quality and conformity of filled or packaged products to standards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove finished packaged items from machine and separate rejected items.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Monitor the production line, watching for problems such as pile-ups, jams, or glue that isn't sticking properly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect and remove defective products and packaging material.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Start machine by engaging controls.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tend or operate machine that packages product.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, oil, and make minor adjustments or repairs to machinery and equipment, such as opening valves or setting guides.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Regulate machine flow, speed, or temperature.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Adjust machine components and machine tension and pressure according to size or processing angle of product.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Supply materials to spindles, conveyors, hoppers, or other feeding devices and unload packaged product.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stack finished packaged items, or wrap protective material around each item, and pack the items in cartons or containers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Package the product in the form in which it will be sent out, for example, filling bags with flour from a chute or spout.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Stock and sort product for packaging or filling machine operation, and replenish packaging supplies, such as wrapping paper, plastic sheet, boxes, cartons, glue, ink, or labels.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Count and record finished and rejected packaged items.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Clean packaging containers, line and pad crates, or assemble cartons to prepare for product packing.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Secure finished packaged items by hand tying, sewing, gluing, stapling, or attaching fastener.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and remove damaged or otherwise inferior materials to prepare raw products for processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
